# LS Graphics — License Note

## Scope
This folder captures Ramotion's LS Graphics (lstore.graphics) aesthetic for internal, non-commercial, single-user macOS SwiftUI app (Clawmachine) research-reference. It is not redistributed and not used commercially.

## What's here
- `previews/` — initial 13 free mockup previews pulled from LS Graphics CDN (full-resolution webp).
- `mockups/` — 184 additional product preview images scraped across categories (devices, branding, packaging, illustrations, abstractions) at 1600px webp. Each file name includes the LS Graphics asset UUID for provenance.
- `mockups/recreated/` — 35 hand-authored SVG mockup frames (iPhone Pro, MacBook Pro, iPad, Apple Watch, browser, business card, poster, tote, t-shirt, hoodie, brochure, box, tube, coffee bag, soda can, wine bottle, vinyl sleeve, sticker, envelope, letterhead, billboard, magazine spread, book cover, phone longscroll, storefront sign, coffee cup, label, folder, A3 poster, square signage, Apple TV, smartwatch, iPad mini, canvas easel, neon sign). These are clean-room vector reproductions of the shape languages LS Graphics sells — not copies of their PSDs.
- `patterns/svg/` — 42 tileable SVG patterns (grids, dots, stripes, crosshatch, chevron, zigzag, herringbone, scales, hexagons, triangles, circuits, isometric, 3D cubes, noise light/heavy, paper grain, rings, waves, nested squares, plus signs, crosses, bricks, arrows, asterisks, accent dots, inverse grid, stars, alternating diagonals, weave, dashes, ticks, grainy accent, grid+accent, halftone). Drop-in `<pattern>` SVGs for use as fills.
- `icons/recreated/` — 48 24×24 outline icons (arrows, check, close, menu, search, home, user, settings, heart, star, bookmark, mail, phone, location, bell, calendar, clock, file, folder, download, upload, image, camera, grid, list, play, pause, link, lock, eye, trash, edit, share, plus, minus, info, warning, cart, cloud, moon, sun, tag, bookmark-filled, refresh, external).

## Sources
- Primary: https://www.ls.graphics (LS Graphics / Ramotion)
- CDN: https://ls-graphics-directus-direct.b-cdn.net/assets/...
- Every acquired image retains the asset UUID in its filename for traceability.

## Terms
- LS Graphics publishes a Terms of Service at https://www.ls.graphics/terms-of-service that limits redistribution. The acquired preview JPG/webp files here are promotional preview images the marketplace itself exposes publicly on category pages.
- Use strictly inside the single-user Clawmachine app, strictly as aesthetic reference. No commercial redistribution. No redistribution of the source files outside this workspace.
- Recreated SVGs (`mockups/recreated/`, `patterns/svg/`, `icons/recreated/`) are original vector work by the operator and are not bound by LS Graphics terms.

## If scope changes
Purchase the LS Graphics subscription ($9/mo at time of writing) to obtain the actual PSD/Figma source files and commercial license, or remove the acquired previews and rely only on the recreated SVG kit.
